# PERF-162 positive: db.Ping inside a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-162-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if err := db.Ping(); err != nil {
		w.WriteHeader(500)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
